# Enhance "Next Steps" Section Design

To improve the visual presentation of the "Next Steps" section on the frontend page of the Neo.mjs project.

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/0b30084e-56eb-4b30-b9ad-5d4ccf1e5084)

I propose transforming the current layout into a card format.

@tobiu Would like to work on this

## Timeline

- 2024-10-05T05:16:56Z @pvishalkeerthan added the `enhancement` label
### @tobiu - 2024-10-05T09:49:16Z

@pvishalkeerthan: Fair warning first => this section is just a placeholder which will get replaced with a testimonials section at some point (quotes from developers / companies who built Neo.mjs apps).

In case you want to work on it anyways as a learning exercise, you are welcome to do so.

### @pvishalkeerthan - 2024-10-08T11:27:33Z

Will the testimonials section be merged with the main content later?

### @tobiu - 2024-11-02T12:58:41Z
